mapper.sql: select tablename, a.tableid, a.tablename_ch, a.data_type, a.operator_net, a.data_source, a.citycode, a.calltype, a.valtext, a.records_all, a.dt from DO_EVENT_TYPE a -- left join (select valtext, valvalue -- from synlte.fieldcodeval -- where codeid = 'JZCODE0084OLD') b on a.calltype = b.valvalue

select tablename, a.tableid, a.tablename_ch, a.data_type, a.operator_net, a.data_source, a.citycode, a.protocol, a.valtext, a.records_all, a.dt from DO_APP_TYPE a -- left join (select valtext, valvalue -- from synlte.fieldcodeval) b on a.protocol = b.valvalue
mapper.select: select distinct tablename_ch as tableNameCh, data_type as dataType from ()

select
distinct citycode
distinct operator_net
distinct data_source
from () where dt >= #{minDt,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and dt < #{maxDt,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
and (upper(data_type) = upper(#{searchName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}) or upper(tablename_ch) = upper(#{searchName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}))
and upper(citycode) = upper(#{areaName,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
and upper(operator_net) = upper(#{operatorName,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
and upper(data_source) = upper(#{networkTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

select distinct tablename as tableNameEn, tablename_ch as tableNameCh, tableid as tableId, '消息：' || tablename_ch || '的' || operator_net || data_source || '数据，应用类型' || protocol || '未翻译。' as alarmcontent from do_app_type where protocol = valtext and dt >= #{minDt,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and dt < #{maxDt,jdbcType=VARCHAR} union all select distinct tablename as tableNameEn, tablename_ch as tableNameCh, tableid as tableId, '消息：' || tablename_ch || '的' || operator_net || data_source || '数据，事件类型' || calltype || '未翻译。' as alarmcontent from do_event_type where calltype = valtext and dt >= #{minDt,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and dt < #{maxDt,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
